TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Cyasi ga niya sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 53 buwan, 165 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 155 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 88%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cyasi hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Cyasi hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cyasi hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cyasi hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cyasi hya' ga Sqiy. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨjas~ɕi ɣa nija s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨjas~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨjas~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨjas~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨjas~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨjas~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕqij. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Cyasi ga niya sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 53 buwan, 165 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 155 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 88%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cyasi hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Cyasi hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cyasi hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cyasi hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cyasi hya' ga Sqiy. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨjas~ɕi ɣa nija s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨjas~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨjas~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨjas~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨjas~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨjas~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕqij. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
